Open items

Known limitations · fixes underway

A couple of open items.

01
Browser “back” drops the onsite shopping session
When a shopper selects an item in the onsite shopping experience and then hits the browser back button, they’re returned to the site without their session — it doesn’t reopen or refresh. Loop has this same limitation today.
Loop · same limitation today
Fix in 3–6 weeks
02
No shopper choice of refund vs. store credit on downsell exchanges
On a downsell exchange (swapping for a lower-priced item), Redo currently defaults every shopper to a single outcome — store credit or refund — and can’t yet let the shopper choose between the two. Loop offers that choice today.
Loop · shopper can choose today
Fix in 3–6 weeks
Hobo Bags · July 2026 · Prepared by RedoConfidential
